mapper.sql: id, execution_no, request_no, parent_no, process_unit_code, biz_no, instance_no, product_code, result, request_time, response_time, elaspe_time, exec_type, request_content, response_content, ext_data, created_date, modified_date, deleted
mapper.select:
select
from process_unit_execution where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} and deleted=0

insert into process_unit_execution (id, execution_no, request_no, parent_no, process_unit_code, biz_no, instance_no, product_code, result, request_time, response_time, elaspe_time, exec_type, ext_data, request_content, response_content, created_date, modified_date) values (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{executionNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processUnitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{bizNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instanceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{result,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{responseTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{elaspeTime,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{execType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{extData,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{requestContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{responseContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifiedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

update process_unit_execution
execution_no = #{executionNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
request_no = #{requestNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
parent_no = #{parentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
process_unit_code = #{processUnitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

response_time = #{responseTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
elaspe_time = #{elaspeTime,jdbcType=INTEGER},

modified_date = #{modifiedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
deleted = #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT},
request_content = #{requestContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
response_content = #{responseContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} and deleted=0

update process_unit_execution set execution_no = #{executionNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, request_no = #{requestNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parent_no = #{parentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, process_unit_code = #{processUnitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, biz_no = #{bizNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, instance_no = #{instanceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, product_code = #{productCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, result = #{result,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, request_time = #{requestTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, response_time = #{responseTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, elaspe_time = #{elaspeTime,jdbcType=INTEGER}, exec_type = #{execType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ext_data = #{extData,jdbcType=OTHER}, request_content = #{requestContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, response_content = #{responseContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} and deleted=0

from process_unit_execution where deleted=0
